title: Pricing Section Component
content:
## Pricing Section Component (`PricingSection`) This component displays the pricing tiers for the DocMed service. It dynamically renders different pricing cards based on the available tiers and provides functionality for users to initiate upgrades or contact sales. ### Key Exports * **`PricingSection`**: The main component that renders the entire pricing section, including a title, description, and a grid of pricing cards. ### `PricingCard` Component This internal component renders an individual pricing card for a given tier. It handles: * Displaying tier name, price, and features. * Highlighting the most popular tier. * Conditional rendering of "Start free trial" or "Get started" buttons. * Handling the upgrade process via an API call to `/api/billing/checkout`. * Opening a contact modal for the "Enterprise" tier. #### Props * `tier` (TierConfig): An object containing the configuration for a specific pricing tier. ### `ContactModal` Component This internal component renders a modal for users to contact sales for enterprise inquiries. It includes: * A form for collecting user details (name, email, company, message). * Submission logic via an API call to `/api/billing/contact`. * Loading and success states for the form submission. #### Props * `onClose` (function): A callback function to close the modal. ### Usage Example ```jsx import { PricingSection } from '@/components/ui/pricing-section'; function MyPage() { return (
{/* Other page content */} {/* Other page content */}
); } export default MyPage; ``` This component is designed to be placed within a page to present the service's pricing structure to users.
